since_last: 33% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.52% · BTC +2.93% · Gold +1.47% · Nasdaq100 -2.01%. 33% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.94%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.94%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.72%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.24%, ADBE +5.11%, ADBE +5.11%, ISRG +5.06%, PLTR +4.89%. Laggards: TER -13.72%, KLAC -13.21%, CEVA -10.88%, LRCX -10.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.57% at $156.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.57% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
